hero.title: Nea ∆êhia s…õ Y…õy…õ na Y…õatumi Adi Dwuma a ∆êw…î Amanaman Ntam Repo Ahorow Mu
hero.lead: IATF boa nnwumakuw, akuw, ne ankorankoro ma w…îsakra …îkwan a w…îfa so y…õ nne…õma a …õho hia ankasa no ma w…îb…õy…õ nnwuma a w…îda no adi w…î baguam.
support: Adwuma a w…îagye ato mu no, w…îtintim w…î IATF GitHub ahyehy…õde no mu w…î copyleft tumi krataa ase, na …îbenfo a …îhw…õ adwuma no so y…õ no w…î baguam.

header.title: ∆Ümanfo kwan a emu da h…î ma k…împuta dwumadi a wotumi de di dwuma

paragraphs: Obi biara betumi de as…õm bi ak…îto IATF no anim. S…õ kuw no tumi y…õ ho adwuma a, wobue …îmanfo GitHub akorae…õ a w…îde b…õy…õ adwuma no.
Adwuma biara a w…îagye ato mu no w…î baabi p…îtee w…î …îmanfo mu a w…îfa so y…õ code, issues, documentation, ne releases, a …îbenfo a …îhw…õ so no na odi anim w…î h…î.

terms.definition: ∆Ühaw ankasa a …õw…î …îkwan a w…îfa so k…î h…î so
Adwuma no ho a …õfata ne …îkwan a w…îfa so y…õ no

header.title: S…õnea …õy…õ adwuma
header.intro: W…îay…õ no nketenkete s…õnea …õb…õy…õ a …õb…õy…õ mmer…õw s…õ wob…õfa …îkwan a …õda …îmanfo anim no so.

steps.title: W…îde as…õm bi a …õho hia to gua
paragraphs: Nhyehy…õe, akuw, anaa ankorankoro betumi de adesr…õ a egyina ahiade bi a …õw…î h…î ankasa so aba.
Wubetumi afi ase abisa w…î w…õbsaet no so, anaa fa e-mail k…îma contact@iatf.cc, anaa Discord so.

steps.title: IATF hwehw…õ mu
paragraphs: Y…õhw…õ dwumadi no ho a …õfata, mfaso a …õw…î so, ne s…õ adwuma no y…õ adwuma a w…îada no adi w…î baguam anaa.

steps.title: W…îy…õ baguam adansedie akorae…õ
paragraphs: S…õ w…îgye adwuma bi to mu a, w…îtintim w…î IATF GitHub ahyehy…õde no mu w…î copyleft tumi krataa ase.
Nhomakorabea no b…õy…õ …îmanfo fie ama mmara no, ns…õm, nkrataa, ne nea w…îayi no adi.

steps.title: ∆Übenfo a …îw…î as…õy…õde na odi adwuma no anim
paragraphs: W…îde …îbenfo a …îhw…õ adwuma no so hy…õ adwuma no mu, na w…îy…õ adwuma no w…î baguam.

header.title: Nhyehy…õe a …îmanfo ani gye ho ho kyer…õwtoh…î
Hwehw…õ adwuma a w…îrey…õ anaa hy…õ adwuma p…îtee bi ase

paragraphs: Fa registry no di dwuma na hu nea w…îada no adi dedaw, anaa fa di dwuma bere a …îhaw p…îtee bi a …õfa …îkwan a wob…õfa so anya bi ho b…õy…õ adwuma no.
